message:
feat(fuzz): differential fuzzer vs vendored redis-server (br-frankenredis-1749)

Adds fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_differential_runtime.rs. A process-once spawn
of legacy_redis_code/redis/src/redis-server feeds a persistent TCP
connection that diffs each case's reply against Runtime::default_strict
executed in-process. A structured Arbitrary CommandSeq samples 30
string/list/set/hash/zset commands with bounded argv. Set replies
(SMEMBERS) are sorted before compare; hash replies (HGETALL) are sorted
as field/value pairs keeping each pair adjacent. Error replies compare
by kind prefix (ERR / WRONGTYPE / …) rather than full wording so prose
drift does not mask real behavioral divergence.

Acceptance run (60s, 150k cases, empty seed corpus): 0 divergences,
0 crashes. Seed corpus of 50 minimized inputs checked in.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
